zh.lifeSummary: 當John Pembridge於大約1266年出生在英國時，他的父親Henry de Pembrugge49歲，母親Elizabeth Gamage45歲。他和Alice De Burley至少有1個兒子。他去世於1331年1月14日之前在他的家鄉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Pembridge于大约1266年出生在英国时，他的父亲Henry de Pembrugge49岁，母亲Elizabeth Gamage45岁。他和Alice De Burley至少有1个儿子。他去世于1331年1月14日之前在他的家乡。

nameMeanings.name: Pembridge
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Pembridge (Herefs), which is recorded as Penebrug(g)e from the 11th to 14th centuries. The place-name derives from an Old English personal name * Pena + Old English brycg ‘bridge’. In some cases the surname may be from Pen Bridge in Shipley (Sussex), which derives from an uncertain first element + Old English brycg.

variants.name: Pember
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Pamber, a habitational name from a place in Hampshire named Pamber, from Old English penn ‘fold, enclosure’ + beorg ‘hill’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When John Pembridge was born about 1266, in England, his father, Henry de Pembrugge, was 49 and his mother, Elizabeth Gamage, was 45. He had at least 1 son with Alice De Burley. He died before 14 January 1331, in his hometown.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Pembridge est né environ 1266, à Angleterre, son père, Henry de Pembrugge, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Gamage, avait 45 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Alice De Burley. Il est décédé avant 14 janvier 1331, dans sa ville natale.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Pembridge um 1266 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry de Pembrugge 49 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Gamage 45. Er hatte mit Alice De Burley mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb vor 14. Januar 1331 in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Pembridge è nato il circa 1266 nel England, il suo padre, Henry de Pembrugge, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Gamage, aveva 45 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Alice De Burley. Morì prima del 14 gennaio 1331, nel sua cittadina.

ja.lifeSummary: John Pembridgeが約1266年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Henry de Pembruggeは49歳，母Elizabeth Gamageは45歳であった。彼はAlice De Burleyとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1331年1月14日以前に故郷で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: John Pembridge(이)가 대략 1266년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry de Pembrugge(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Gamage(은)는 45세였다. 그는 Alice De Burley(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1331년 1월 14일 이전 그의 고향에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Pembridge nasceu aproximadamente 1266, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry de Pembrugge, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Gamage, tinha 45 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Alice De Burley. Ele faleceu antes 14 de janeiro de 1331, em sua cidade natal.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Pembridge родился около 1266 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Henry de Pembrugge было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Gamage, 45. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Alice De Burley. Он умер перед 14 январь 1331 г. в его родном городе.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Pembridge nació aproximadamente 1266, en Inglaterra, su papá, Henry de Pembrugge, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Gamage, tenía 45 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Alice De Burley. Murió antes de 14 de enero de 1331, en su pueblo.
